title: River Reviewer Review Artifact
description: Structured output for a complete River Reviewer run, covering plan, context, findings, and debug info.

version.description: Schema version. Always "1" for this revision. New schemas should be created as separate files (e.g. review-artifact.v2.schema.json) per the versioning policy in pages/reference/stable-interfaces.md.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the review run completed.

phase.description: SDLC phase the review was executed against.

status.description: Terminal status of the review run.

plan.description: Execution plan computed before the review.

selectedSkills.description: Skills that were selected for execution.

modelHint.description: Preferred model tier hint. Mirrors the ModelHintEnum used in src/lib/skillYamlSchema.mjs.

skippedSkills.description: Skills that were excluded from the run and the reasons why.

reasons.description: List of reasons the skill was skipped.

plannerMode.description: Mode the AI planner was invoked with.

plannerReasons.description: Per-skill reasoning produced by the AI planner.

impactTags.description: Tags describing the impact area of the changes (e.g. security, performance).

findings.description: Review findings produced during the run. Each item conforms to the issue schema in output.schema.json.

context.description: Repository and diff context captured at review time.

repoRoot.description: Absolute path to the repository root.

mergeBase.description: Git merge-base commit SHA used for diffing.

changedFiles.description: List of file paths included in the review diff.

tokenEstimate.description: Estimated token count of the optimized diff text.

rawTokenEstimate.description: Estimated token count of the raw (unoptimized) diff text.

reduction.description: Percentage of tokens saved by diff optimization (0-100).

debug.description: Free-form debug information. Structure is not guaranteed across versions.

finding.description: A single review finding. Mirrors the issue schema in output.schema.json so that findings can be cross-validated by both schemas.

id.description: Unique identifier for the issue within this run.

ruleId.description: Identifier of the rule or skill that produced the issue.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the issue.

message.description: Detailed explanation of the issue and context.

severity.description: Severity level assigned to the issue.

phase.description: SDLC phase where this issue was found.

file.description: File path or logical name relevant to the issue.

line.description: Line number related to the issue when applicable.

lineEnd.description: End line number for multi-line issues.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the finding.
